site.title: missingwires
site.tagline: A few small things I build and keep online.

projects.name: GridText
projects.description: A self-drawn spatial text editor — a single-file, zero-build canvas for arranging text, tables and regions on an infinite grid.

projects.name: Tuner
projects.description: Placeholder for the next project. Drop its files in src/tuner/ and it appears here automatically.

projects.name: MindTheGap
projects.description: A local-first, browser-only HTN/HDDL task compiler: it reads planning workspaces from a GitHub repo, decomposes a goal into an executable plan in the browser, and renders the solve across six surfaces (Tree, Icicle, Sunburst, Gantt, Flame, Causal).
